full_text:
Jiang Wei (Boyue) 姜維 (伯約)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Jiang Wei (姜維), styledBoyue (伯約), was born in Ji County, Tian Shui Prefecture (Presently Gangu County in Gansu Province. Served Shu as Minister of War, eventually inheriting Zhuge Liang’s responsibilities. Jiang Wei was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom and the Shu Kingdom. Jiang Wei lived during the Later Han Dynasty and Three Kingdoms periods of Chinese history.
